# BE-TANGO
> Argentine tango dance school in Brussels and Woluwe, Belgium. Classes for all levels, taught by Sonja and Sven Breynaert. Instruction available in English, Dutch (Nederlands), and French (Français). 5/5 rating based on 141 Google reviews.

## English — Tango Classes
- [All Tango Classes](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/): Overview of all class types and levels
- [Beginners](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/beginners/): Start-to-Tango beginner course, 14 lessons, no partner needed
- [Experienced](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/experienced/): Intermediate and advanced tango classes
- [Brussels Classes](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/brussels/): Weekly classes at Rue du Marais 68, 1000 Brussels
- [Woluwe Classes](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/woluwe/): Weekly classes at Avenue Orban 54, 1150 Woluwe-Saint-Pierre
- [Free Trial Class](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/free-trial/): Book a free first lesson, no commitment
- [Private Lessons](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/private/): One-on-one or couple instruction
- [Online Classes](https://www.be-tango.be/tango-classes/online/): Learn Argentine tango online via video

## English — Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.be-tango.be/): Homepage with class overview, locations, and reviews
- [Contact](https://www.be-tango.be/contact/): Contact form, addresses, and map
- [FAQ](https://www.be-tango.be/faq/): Frequently asked questions about tango classes
- [Blog](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/): Tango articles, guides, and inspiration
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.be-tango.be/privacy-policy/): Data protection information
- [Terms and Conditions](https://www.be-tango.be/terms-and-conditions/): General terms

## English — Blog Posts
- [Why Learn Tango](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/why-learn-tango/): Benefits and reasons to start dancing Argentine tango
- [Why Argentine Tango is the Best Dance for Adults in Brussels](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/why-argentine-tango-best-dance-adults-brussels/): Comparison with other dances
- [History of Argentine Tango](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/history-of-argentine-tango/): Origins and evolution of the dance
- [Different Styles of Argentine Tango](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/different-styles-of-argentine-tango/): Milonguero, salon, nuevo, and more
- [Tango Vals and Milonga Differences](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/tango-vals-milonga-differences/): How these three dances relate
- [Tango Glossary](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/tango-glossary/): Definitions of common tango terms
- [Argentine Tango vs Ballroom Tango](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/argentine-tango-ballroom-tango-differences/): Key differences explained
- [5 Tips for the Best Tango Shoes](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/5-tips-best-tango-shoes/): Shoe selection guide
- [Tango Classes Brussels for Beginners](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/argentine-tango-classes-brussels-beginners/): What to expect as a beginner
- [Tango Events in Brussels](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/tango-events-brussels/): Local milongas and tango events
- [International Tango Events](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/international-tango-events/): Festivals and marathons worldwide
- [Tango for Couples in Brussels](https://www.be-tango.be/blog/tango-for-couples-brussels/): Why tango is great for couples

## Français — Cours de Tango
- [Accueil](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/): Page d'accueil en français
- [Tous les cours](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/): Vue d'ensemble de tous les cours
- [Débutants](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/debutants/): Cours Start-to-Tango pour débutants
- [Expérimentés](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/experimentes/): Cours intermédiaires et avancés
- [Bruxelles](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/bruxelles/): Cours hebdomadaires à Bruxelles
- [Woluwe](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/woluwe/): Cours hebdomadaires à Woluwe
- [Essai gratuit](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/essai-gratuit/): Réservez un premier cours gratuit
- [Cours particuliers](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/particuliers/): Cours individuels ou en couple
- [Cours en ligne](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/cours-de-tango/en-ligne/): Apprendre le tango en ligne
- [Contactez-nous](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/contactez-nous/): Formulaire de contact et adresses
- [Blog FR](https://www.be-tango.be/fr/blog/): Articles et guides sur le tango en français

## Nederlands — Tangolessen
- [Startpagina](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/): Nederlandstalige startpagina
- [Alle lessen](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/): Overzicht van alle tangolessen
- [Beginners](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/beginners/): Start-to-Tango beginnerscursus
- [Ervaring](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/ervaring/): Lessen voor gevorderden
- [Brussel](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/brussel/): Wekelijkse lessen in Brussel
- [Woluwe](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/woluwe/): Wekelijkse lessen in Woluwe
- [Gratis proefles](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/gratis-proefles/): Boek een gratis eerste les
- [Privélessen](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/prive/): Individuele lessen of als koppel
- [Online lessen](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/tangolessen/online/): Tango leren via video
- [Contacteer ons](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/contacteer-ons/): Contactformulier en adressen
- [Blog NL](https://www.be-tango.be/nl/blog/): Tango artikelen en gidsen in het Nederlands
